summary: Round 2 deep UX sweep using 3 additional guidance docs (ARCHITECT-GUIDE-v2 / ARCHITECT-RESPONSE / UX-FIX-THREE-TRACK-PLAN) plus the 4 UI/UX skills and 12 prior critique docs. Round 1 landed 28 commits (RUN-87..115b): design refresh + regression fixes + systematic hero-metric sweep. Round 2 goes deeper: read P1/P5 business-logic docs per flow, fix real infrastructure bugs (not just visual polish), apply UX-FIX three-track plan (UX-3 infrastructure → UX-2 state derivation → UX-1 cosmetic).
newGuidanceLoaded: ARCHITECT-RESPONSE-FrameworkVisualGrammarBuildOrder.md — 5 UI grammars, build order (Batch A verdict grids → B topology → C card lists → D mixed), FLOW-29 as reference
ARCHITECT-GUIDE-v2-ScreenExaminationWithBusinessLogic.md — read docs/flow-coverage/{slug}/P1+P2+P5 before touching any page
UX-FIX-THREE-TRACK-PLAN.md — UX-3 (infra fixes) → UX-2 (state derivation, 29 flows) → UX-1 (polish)

keyConcreteTargets.issue: AuctionDashboardPage calls /api/dynamic/auctions and /api/dynamic/advertiser-budget — both return 400 INVALID_INDEX because server requires xiigen- prefix. Fix: use xiigen-auction-audit and xiigen-advertiser-budgets.
keyConcreteTargets.impact: 'Failed to fetch' visible as normal page content; all metrics show $0/0

keyConcreteTargets.issue: AdminCrudPanel renders raw 'No bootstrap records' string to users when ES index has zero docs
keyConcreteTargets.impact: ~20 flows show engineering-leak empty-state copy; root cause of ~80 BLOCKER PNGs

keyConcreteTargets.issue: Booking pages stuck in loading state (18/32 PNGs show booking-loading forever); needs timeout fallback
keyConcreteTargets.impact: PNG capture fails with load spinner as primary content

keyConcreteTargets.issue: MOCK_STATES labels are topology-edge strings copied from P1 inventory (e.g., 'BundleValidator → Orchestrator when (emits ...)') — not user-observable states
keyConcreteTargets.impact: Mock-state PNGs show engineering service-graph edges as plain text in white divs
